data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding minimum remaining-validity days.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of specific requirement items related to minimum remaining-validity days, but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for credential expiry dates and reverification timestamps, which are critical for assessing validity, yet no such data is present in the evidence. As a result, the validation cannot be completed, leading to a blocked status.
gaps: No evidence of requirement items with minimum remaining-validity days.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
